stem: A digital marketing study surveys 100 users shown the ad and observes 20 positive outcomes out of 100 (20.0%). Estimate the true click-through rate and provide a 95% confidence interval.

ground_truth.answer: Sample proportion: 0.2. Wilson 95% CI: [0.1334, 0.2888]. Point estimate: 0.2111.

common_failure_modes: Using the Wald interval (p̂ ± z√(p̂(1-p̂)/n)) which performs poorly for small samples
Not reporting the confidence interval alongside the point estimate
